economic_notes: Smith's Landing Development Corporation accounted for by modified equity method. Investment portfolio managed by CIBC Wood Gundy totalling $29,963,704 at market value including equities, fixed income, and cash equivalents. Unrealized gains of $6,229,432. Management fees of $270,503 paid to investment managers. Settlement Capital Fund is the primary non-financial asset.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 - note that audit report is dated January 25, 2023, nearly two years after year-end. Smith's Landing Development Corporation is accounted for by modified equity method (1 GBE). The large non-financial asset base is dominated by the Settlement Capital Fund investments ($29,963,704 market value) held with CIBC Wood Gundy, which are classified as non-financial assets (investments). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,786,636 + Alberta Government $110,000 + FNDF $215,798 = $3,112,434. OSR calculated as total revenue $3,634,729 minus government transfers $3,112,434 = $522,295 (includes investment income and other revenue net of deferrals). No schedule of remuneration provided. COVID-19 noted as significant event. Chief and Council expenditures of $141,715 disclosed in program schedule.
